description: PT2 triage decision tree v2 — enriched with 418 relationship edges across 135 entities. Maps error signatures to diagnostic paths, workarounds, and configs.

error_signatures: exceeded maximum allowed number of cache entries
entry_points.first_step: Run with TORCH_LOGS=recompiles to see which guard triggered the recompilation

diagnostic_path.look_for: Guard failure message — which tensor attribute changed

diagnostic_path.action: Check if duck_shape is the cause
diagnostic_path.look_for: Message mentions 'duck sizing added this equality'
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Set torch.fx.experimental._config.use_duck_shape = False

diagnostic_path.look_for: Guard on Eq(N, s0) from tensor slicing
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Use torch._dynamo.maybe_mark_dynamic instead of mark_dynamic

diagnostic_path.look_for: 'Cannot call sizes() on tensor with symbolic sizes/strides'
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Set torch._dynamo.config.optimize_ddp = False OR dynamic=False

diagnostic_path.action: Check if automatic dynamic shapes triggering
diagnostic_path.look_for: Dynamic shapes being applied without explicit request
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Set assume_static_by_default = True or declare TORCH_COMPILE_DYNAMIC_SOURCES
Ensure guard_nn_modules matches your use case

entry_points.first_step: Run torch._dynamo.explain(fn, *args) to see all graph breaks

diagnostic_path.if_yes: Rewrite with supported equivalent
Set capture_scalar_outputs=True or use torch.cond()

diagnostic_path.action: Check if dynamic output shape ops
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Set capture_dynamic_output_shape_ops=True

diagnostic_path.look_for: Graph break in non-PyTorch module (numpy, optree, einops)
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Wrap the call or use pytree instead of optree
Set torch._dynamo.config.allow_rnn = True

diagnostic_path.action: Check if forward hooks causing breaks
diagnostic_path.look_for: Graph break in hook registration or execution
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Known limitation — restructure hook usage or accept break

entry_points.first_step: Run with TORCHDYNAMO_REPRO_AFTER=aot TORCHDYNAMO_REPRO_LEVEL=4 to generate a minimal repro

diagnostic_path.look_for: uint8/bool tensor mismatch near relu boundary
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Set TORCHDYNAMO_REPRO_IGNORE_NON_FP=1
Issue is in AOT/decomposition, not Inductor
Set emulate_precision_casts = True
Set torch.backends.cudnn.allow_tf32 = False

diagnostic_path.action: Check if random init masking real issue
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Test with pretrained weights — random init can be numerically unstable
Set torch._dynamo.config.optimize_ddp = False
Set autotune_local_cache = False or force_disable_caches = True

diagnostic_path.action: Run minifier to get minimal repro

diagnostic_path.if_yes: Likely FakeTensor dispatch issue — check if scalar op or cross-device

diagnostic_path.look_for: 'Cannot view a tensor with shape' or 'stride mismatch'
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Likely functionalization issue — try aot_eager_decomp_partition backend
Set capture_autograd_function = True
Dynamic shape arithmetic issue — try static shapes or constrain values

diagnostic_path.action: Check if weakref blocking device move
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Known issue with compiled module + device movement

diagnostic_path.look_for: Multiple data-dependent errors in detection model
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Use torch.export.export_for_training with draft_export=True

diagnostic_path.look_for: Non-critical compilation where eager fallback is acceptable
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Set suppress_errors = True (will lose optimization)

entry_points.first_step: Separate compile time vs runtime — is first-run slow (compile) or all-runs slow (runtime)?

diagnostic_path.look_for: Is first-run slow (compile) or all-runs slow (runtime)?

diagnostic_path.action: If compile time: check graph size
diagnostic_path.look_for: Large number of nodes in FX graph
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Check for unbounded scheduling or quadratic runtime asserts

diagnostic_path.action: If runtime: NCU profile the kernel

diagnostic_path.look_for: FP16 autocast 10x slower than FP32 at small batch sizes
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Use batch_first=False with manual transpose+contiguous

diagnostic_path.look_for: Kernel compiled for cuda:0 but running on cuda:1
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Update to latest PyTorch
Ensure divisibility hints are set, or use static shapes
Set mode='max-autotune' or max_autotune_gemm=True

entry_points.first_step: Set TORCH_USE_CUDA_DSA=1 for better CUDA error messages

diagnostic_path.look_for: Any tensor with size 0 in any dimension
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Known issue with empty tensor codegen

diagnostic_path.action: Check if custom op stream issue
diagnostic_path.look_for: First N elements correct then zeros
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Custom op must use at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream()
Inductor compiled for wrong GPU architecture
Issue is in Dynamo/AOT, not Inductor

diagnostic_path.action: Check if NCCL hang in distributed
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Enable compiler_collectives for SPMD sync

entry_points.first_step: Compare eager vs compiled output element-wise with torch.allclose(atol=1e-5, rtol=1e-3)

diagnostic_path.look_for: Which elements differ and by how much

diagnostic_path.action: Check if mutation lost on clone
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Inductor clones for alignment, disconnecting mutation — restructure code

diagnostic_path.action: Check if fake kernel stride mismatch
diagnostic_path.look_for: Custom op's register_fake returns different strides
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Ensure register_fake matches real kernel's output metadata exactly

diagnostic_path.look_for: AOTI output degrades with different input shape than export
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Match export dummy input shape to inference shape
Check if roll/rotate ops being fused as pointwise — use scalar indexing
Clear autotune cache or set force_disable_caches = True

entry_points.first_step: Distinguish compile-time OOM vs runtime OOM

diagnostic_path.look_for: Does OOM happen during compilation or during forward/backward?

diagnostic_path.if_yes: Disable CUDA graphs: triton.cudagraphs = False
Set PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True

diagnostic_path.look_for: OOM from autograd saving tensors for backward
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Wrap inference in torch.no_grad()

diagnostic_path.look_for: OOM during graph compilation, not execution
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Graph may be too large — split model or use regional compilation

entry_points.first_step: Profile compilation with TORCHINDUCTOR_PROFILE=1 or TORCH_COMPILE_CPROFILE=1

diagnostic_path.look_for: Which phase takes the most time: tracing, lowering, or codegen?
Thousands of unbacked SymInts from split/slice
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Restructure to avoid many split operations

diagnostic_path.look_for: NetworkX graph algorithm taking too long
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Large fusion groups — reduce model complexity or graph size

diagnostic_path.action: Check if FX graph cache is working
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Ensure fx_graph_cache = True
May be SymPy interpreter noise — not a real error

entry_points.first_step: Check if strict or non-strict mode — try strict=False first

diagnostic_path.look_for: NMS, ROI, bounding box ops causing cascade
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Use draft_export=True for detection models
Match export dummy input shape to inference shape

diagnostic_path.look_for: Error with y[0, b] style indexing
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Replace with y[0][b] (chain single-dim indexing)
Cast before .item(): x.to(dtype=torch.int32).item()

entry_points.first_step: Run torch.library.opcheck to validate custom op registration

diagnostic_path.look_for: Which checks fail (autograd, fake tensor, etc.)
Output metadata (shape, stride, dtype) must match real kernel exactly
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Fix register_fake to return tensors with correct metadata
Use at::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream() in kernel launch
Set capture_autograd_function = True

error_signatures: Cannot call sizes() on tensor with symbolic
entry_points.first_step: Check if DDPOptimizer partitioning is the issue

diagnostic_path.if_yes: DDPOptimizer partitioning issue

diagnostic_path.look_for: symbolic sizes error on last batch
diagnostic_path.if_yes: Use dynamic=False or pad last batch

diagnostic_path.look_for: Accuracy loss with autocast + compiled DDP
diagnostic_path.if_yes: DDPOptimizer splits through autocast — disable it
Set enable_compiler_collectives = True for SPMD sync
